compiled_state.title: Modify sprint/SKILL.md: filter interaction:deferred from execution batch
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md to filter stories/epics tagged interaction:deferred from the execution batch, following the design:awaiting_import filtering pattern (lines 793-814 and 1167).

**Changes:**

1. In Phase 2 story analysis (where design:awaiting_import filter is applied): add parallel check for interaction:deferred tag
   - If story's parent epic has interaction:deferred tag: skip story from batch execution
   - Log: 'Story <id> skipped — parent epic tagged interaction:deferred. Re-run /dso:brainstorm <epic-id> interactively to resolve cross-epic interactions.'

2. In the batch status/output section (line 1167 table): add new row:
   | SKIPPED_INTERACTION_DEFERRED: <id> <title> | Deferred — parent epic tagged interaction:deferred (cross-epic interactions unresolved) |

3. Non-interactive handling: sprint must not halt when it encounters an interaction:deferred epic — it should filter and continue with remaining work (same as design:awaiting_import behavior).

Reference: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md for tag semantics.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (MODIFY)

## Dependencies
Blocked by: 1e39-47bf (RED test)
